title: About IMMARKUS
developedBy: IMMARKUS: Image Annotation has been developed by Prof. Dr. Hilde De Weerdt, <rainerLink>Dr. Rainer Simon</rainerLink>, Dawn Zhuang, Dr. Lee Sunkyu, Dr. Iva Stojević, Meret Meister, and Xi Wangzhi as part of the Regionalizing Infrastructures in Chinese History (<regInfraLink>RegInfra</regInfraLink>) project.
